onboarding.description: To get started, choose a transcription model

speechLanguage.title: Language
speechLanguage.description: Select the language for speech recognition. Auto will automatically determine the language, while selecting a specific language can improve accuracy for that language.
speechLanguage.descriptionUnsupported: Parakeet models automatically detect the language. No manual selection is needed.

uiLanguage.title: Interface language
uiLanguage.description: Choose the language that Handy uses for its interface text.

modelConfiguration.title: Model configuration
modelConfiguration.description: Handy keeps AI models grouped by their intended usage so you can pick the right toolkit for transcription, text transformation, or custom prompts. Adding models here makes them available for prompts and AI routines throughout the app.
modelConfiguration.selectModelDescription: Pick a model from the provider's list and assign it a purpose.
modelConfiguration.placeholder: Select or enter a model name
modelConfiguration.emptyDescription: Add one from the provider above to get started.

text.label: Text
text.hint: Used for prompt editing and polishing
